meta.title: S4 Classic: First Ever ICS On The Internet Session
meta.description: At S4x12 (2012), Eireann Leverett gave the first ever presentation on ICS devices that were Internet accessible. A presentation that has been given 100's of times since and a problem that is still not solved.
